name: Xp22_3_STS_VCX_region
description: Xp22.31 region containing the steroid sulfatase (STS) gene, flanked by VCX gene family copies on directly oriented SDs (S1, S2, S3, S4 / VCX2, VCX3A, VCX, VCX3B). NAHR between flanking VCX duplicons drives the recurrent ~1.5 Mb Xp22.31 deletion underlying X-linked ichthyosis.

architecture.internal_structure: VCX paralogs in direct orientation flanking the STS gene; SDs at >99% identity over ~10 kb; recurrent ~1.5 Mb deletion in male hemizygous carriers.
